subcodes.first_line: O youthful sapling of the divine garden! That which was written to his honour Bahhaj, upon him be the Most Glorious Glory of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نونهال بوستان الهی آنچه بجناب بهاج پرابتهاج علیه بهاء الله الابهی مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
